sharingCriteriaRules.label: Facility Scoped Appointments (TEMPLATE - clone per facility)
sharingCriteriaRules.description: REQ-053/VS-20 facility scoping. TEMPLATE: one fixed Facility per rule, Edit access to that facility's public group. Admin must clone per real facility (new group + value) -- see VS-20 build notes; Lookup-criteria deployability to be confirmed by dry-run.
